reference: Hello, I am a forty-four-year-old male in good health, except for moderate depression diagnosed a year ago. Lately, I noticed a lump in my ribs, five inches below my left armpit, and three inches from my left nipple. The lump feels semi-hard and moves up and down a bit when I apply pressure with my fingers. So far, it is painless. Recently, I had to take antibiotics because of laryngitis and coughing. I would appreciate your comments about my lump, as well as any suggestions.
text: to create a watch that combined everything from precision chronograph movement and speedometer to water resistance and compass.
